evals.expected_output: Worker 2 writes Sections IV and V using ONLY the pre-loaded data, without attempting to read fs_index.json or data_bundles.json

assertions.name: no_file_reads
assertions.assertion: Output should not contain evidence of file reading (no mentions of reading fs_index.json, data_bundles.json, or using Read tool)

assertions.name: uses_provided_data
assertions.assertion: Output should use the exact values from the provided data bundle (revenue: 3252347, PBT: 275845, PAT: 215492)

assertions.name: writes_required_sections
assertions.assertion: Output should contain both Section IV (Core Conclusions) and Section V (Core Financial Performance)

evals.expected_output: Worker should either: (1) use available data and note limitations, or (2) ask coordinator for help - but NOT attempt to read files to get the missing data

assertions.name: no_file_reads_when_data_missing
assertions.assertion: Worker should NOT attempt to read fs_index.json or any files to get missing ROE data

assertions.name: appropriate_response_to_missing_data
assertions.assertion: Worker should either: (a) acknowledge limitation and work with available data, (b) ask coordinator for complete bundle, or (c) explain what's missing and why it matters

evals.prompt:
You are the coordinator for the financial-analysis-report skill. Your task is to generate a complete 18-section report for CHINHIN FY2024.

You have:
- test_data/output/CHINHIN/2024/fs_index.json (current year)
- test_data/output/CHINHIN/2023/fs_index.json (prior year)

Follow the skill workflow to spawn workers and generate the report.
evals.expected_output: Coordinator should: (1) read data_bundles.json once, (2) extract worker-specific bundles, (3) pass data directly in worker prompts - workers should NOT read files

assertions.name: coordinator_reads_data_once
assertions.assertion: Coordinator should read data_bundles.json or fs_index.json files once (or use extract_worker_bundle.py), not multiple times

assertions.name: workers_receive_preloaded_data
assertions.assertion: When spawning workers, coordinator should pass data directly in prompts (not tell workers to read files)

assertions.name: complete_report_generated
assertions.assertion: Output should contain all 18 sections (I-XVIII) plus executive summary
